title: ernodea littoralis
intro: Ernodea littoralis, also known as the beach-elder or scrub-elder, is a small, flowering shrub native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Ernodea littoralis is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating colds and flu, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
